objective: Actions-backed execution of the owner-authorized bounded B4-B redesign. Implement a finite raw-source grammar for the exact governed Section 3.1 inventory block, preserve the stage-A registry bindings and exact documentation replacement, and make no claim about rendered Markdown semantics. Start from protected main; do not copy the rejected CommonMark emulation from Draft PR #60 or rely on the locally authored PR #61 as execution evidence.

attempt_lineage.reuse_policy: requirements and adversarial evidence only; do not copy rejected implementation code or treat local PR #61 as execution evidence

production_api_exact.registry_argument: the supplied stage-A registry is authoritative and must actually be used

bounded_raw_source_grammar.interpretation: raw source lines only; this validator does not parse or make claims about CommonMark, GFM, HTML blocks, fenced code, blockquotes, reference links or renderer output
contiguous_lines_after_sentinel: | Role | Canonical repository | Visibility | `main` SHA | Boundary |
bounded_raw_source_grammar.line_comparison: raw full-line equality without strip, case folding, entity decoding, URL decoding or Markdown normalization
bounded_raw_source_grammar.row_shape: one leading delimiter, exactly five preserved interior cells with exactly one ASCII padding space, one trailing delimiter
bounded_raw_source_grammar.repository_url_token: the complete raw row contains exactly one literal lowercase https://github.com/OWNER/REPOSITORY token
bounded_raw_source_grammar.repository_cell: the second cell fullmatches exactly [`FULL_NAME`](URL), with registry full_name and URL and no prefix or suffix
out_of_scope_examples: whether the sentinel renders as a Markdown heading
whether later prose renders as another table
HTML block start and termination rules

identity_binding.join_key: exact first Role cell equals registry label
identity_binding.main_sha_rule: exact surrounding backticks and lowercase [0-9a-f]{40}; digits-only SHA is structurally valid

expected_inventory_rows.boundary: owns governance, schemas, reusable workflows and evidence contracts
owns the minimal downstream skeleton and repeatability tests
owns the automated agentic software-development platform runtime and platform delivery

required_regressions: exact committed plan plus exact committed registry returns an empty list
missing and duplicate raw sentinel return their specific codes
the exact blank/header/separator sequence is mandatory and raw whitespace variants fail
fewer or more than five preserved interior cells fail
ordinary and empty sixth cells fail before semantic field validation
a fourth contiguous leading-pipe row fails
each raw row contains exactly one literal GitHub repository URL token
repository cell prefix, suffix, full-name mutation and URL mutation fail
Role duplication and label-set substitution fail
visibility, boundary and SHA mutations return specific codes
digits-only 40-character lowercase-hex SHA is structurally accepted
supplied registry label, full_name, URL, visibility and boundary mutations prove the registry is used
non-string plan and structurally invalid registry return their input codes
tests contain no CommonMark, GFM or HTML parser and make no renderer-semantic assertions

documentation_change_exact.only_changed_line: the third Section 3.1 inventory data row
documentation_change_exact.replacement_row: | AI Development Studio platform | [`yurikuchumov-ux/-ai-development-studio`](https://github.com/yurikuchumov-ux/-ai-development-studio) | private | `f6550d4078ffccc952db269081619fdfe57e598c` | owns the automated agentic software-development platform runtime and platform delivery |

review_focus: contract and implementation describe the same finite raw-source grammar
no rejected PR #60 parser code is copied
no false success exists within the declared raw-source grammar
failures outside the declared grammar are not misreported as supported behavior
